title: Replace Studiora logo with uploaded custom image

requirements.summary: Replace existing logo with uploaded custom image in Layout header and LoginPage
acceptanceCriteria: The uploaded image is saved as `frontend/public/assets/generated/studiora-logo.png`.
The sticky header in Layout.tsx renders the image as the Studiora logo (replacing any prior logo element).
The login/landing page (LoginPage.tsx) renders the same image as the app logo.
The logo image has appropriate alt text ('Studiora logo') and a sensible display size (e.g., h-8 or h-10 in the header, larger on the login page).
No broken image references or leftover old logo elements remain.

file_operations.description: Save the uploaded custom logo image (open book with green sprout and blue/purple circular background) as the new Studiora logo asset at this exact workspace path: `frontend/public/assets/generated/studiora-logo.png`.

Replace the current logo element in the sticky header with an tag that references `/assets/generated/studiora-logo.png` as the src. Set appropriate alt text to 'Studiora logo' and apply a height class (h-8 or h-10) for proper sizing in the header. Remove any previous SVG-based or other logo implementations to avoid duplicates.

Replace the current logo element on the login/landing page with an tag that references `/assets/generated/studiora-logo.png` as the src. Set appropriate alt text to 'Studiora logo' and apply a larger height class (e.g., h-16, h-20, or h-24) for prominent display on the landing page. Remove any previous SVG-based or other logo implementations to avoid duplicates.
